message:
test(syscall): signalfd4 allowed-flags success + invalid-bit EINVAL + in-place-update (bd-qdsc6, bd-vitcn, bd-hzkc6)

Three raw-syscall veneer tests:

bd-qdsc6  signalfd4_valid_mask_cloexec_nonblock_succeeds
          signalfd4(-1, &mask, size, SFD_CLOEXEC|SFD_NONBLOCK) must
          return a live fd — allowed flag bits must not trigger EINVAL.
bd-vitcn  signalfd4_valid_mask_cloexec_plus_invalid_bit_is_einval
          signalfd4(CLOEXEC|0x8) must return EINVAL — unknown flag
          bits are rejected even when a valid flag is also present.
bd-hzkc6  signalfd4_existing_fd_same_mask_returns_same_fd
          signalfd4(existing_fd, &mask, size, 0) updates the mask in
          place and returns the same fd.

Verification (rch + CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_cc):
  cargo test -p frankenlibc-core --test syscall_veneer_test signalfd4
                                                     5 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-core --tests -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check                                 clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
